description_long: This is a classic rectangular wooden picnic table with two long benches attached on either side, designed for communal outdoor seating. The tabletop and benches are constructed from parallel wooden planks, each secured with visible metallic bolts or rivets. The table is supported by a robust wooden frame, featuring diagonal braces and crossbeams for added stability. The wood has a natural, light brown finish, and the hardware is metallic, likely galvanized steel, for weather resistance. The benches are integrated into the main frame, ensuring they remain securely attached and aligned with the tabletop. There is no visible hole in the center of the tabletop for an umbrella.
description: A sturdy wooden picnic table with attached benches and visible metal fasteners, designed for outdoor communal use. The table features a natural wood finish and a robust support frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the table and one bench, with visible bolts along the planks.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the width of the tabletop and benches, as well as the crossbeam and support structure underneath.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the opposite bench and the same plank and bolt arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again displaying the tabletop width, benches, and the sturdy underframe.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by a rectangular wooden frame with diagonal braces and crossbeams connecting the legs for stability.
